channel.title: MSc. Muhammad Mohsin Ghaffar | Sustainable Embedded AI

item.title: eFAirWrite: Bringing energy efficient text entry to next generation smart devices
item.description: Citation: eFAirWrite: Bringing Energy Efficient Text Entry to Next Generation Smart Devices. M. M. Ghaffar, A. Abdullah, J. Younas, V. Rybalkin, J. Ney, P. Lukowiczc, N. Wehn. Expert Systems With Applications, Elsevier, 2025. https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S0957417425019256?via%3Dihub

item.title: MSc. Muhammad Mohsin Ghaffar
item.description: Muhammad Mohsin Ghaffar is a researcher at Division of Microelectronic Systems Design (EMS), Technische Universität Kaiserslautern.

item.title: Segmentation of Wheat Rust Disease Using Co-Salient Feature Extraction
item.description: Citation: Segmentation of Wheat Rust Disease Using Co-Salient Feature Extraction. Hirra Anwar, Haseeb Muhammad, Muhammad Mohsin Ghaffar, Muhammad Ali Afridi, Muhammad Jawad Khan, Christian Weis, Norbert Wehn, Faisal Shafait (2025). AgriEngineering, 2025. https://www.mdpi.com/2624-7402/7/2/23

item.title: The NWRD Dataset: An Open-Source Annotated Segmentation Dataset of Diseased Wheat Crop
